title: Natchathira Bangala Lyrics Nesam
stanzas:
vidha vidhamaa sela katti
mola molamaa malli vachi
jockettula jannal vachi
face cutula minnal vachi
oduthaar paar kudhira
idhu pora idam madhura
un nenjukulla dhill irundhaa
ninnu paaru edhura (2)

engaloda veettukilla kadhavu
vaasal kadhavu
ada ellaarum ellaarum
inga varavu, kudumbam varavu

chilli chicken polathaandi
udambu, kannadi udambu
ivan pidikkura pidiyila
norungum ezhumbu.
mudhugu ezhumbu.

ah saingaalam sallaaba sangeetham
naanthaane unnoda sandhosam

license-u thevayilla enakku
ippa naan unakku.
nee eduthida eduthida
kodukkum sarakku
enakkul irukku.

paappaa, udhatula oru
muththam vachi thodangu
kanakka thodangu.
ivan madiyila vidiyira
varaikkum mayangu.
sugamaa urangu.

haiyyo haiyyo rummum
jinnum onnaa ooththu
enna aagum paarkalaam.
yezhaam number roomkulla
kannaa moochi aadalaam.

ippodhe ennodu vandhaadu va
en nenjodu roja poo
pandhaadu.

vidha vidhamaa sela katti
mola molamaa malli vachi
jockettula jannal vachi
face cutula minnal vachi
oduthaar paar kudhira
idhu pora idam madhura
un nenjukulla dhill irundhaa
ninnu paaru edhura

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Natchathira Bangala'?

The song conveys themes of joy and togetherness, celebrating familial bonds and happiness.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Nesam'?

In the movie, the song reflects moments of celebration and unity among family members.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Subha and composed by Deva.

When was 'Natchathira Bangala' released?

The song was released on January 14, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Natchathira Bangala' from the movie *Nesam* encapsulates the warmth of familial love and celebration. Its lively melody and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of nostalgia and happiness, making it a perfect fit for joyous occasions. The song paints a vivid picture of togetherness, inviting listeners to reminisce about cherished moments with loved ones. Overall, it serves as a beautiful reminder of the bonds that unite families.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Natchathira Bangala is a delightful melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and joy. This enchanting song from the movie Nesam resonates with listeners, thanks to its captivating lyrics and memorable tune. Experience the magic of this classic as it transports you back to cherished moments of celebration and happiness.
stanzaMeanings: Don't stay single in the star house.
It's all about the way you tie your hair, the way you cut your face, and how you look. If you have sweetness in your heart, look at me.
In our house, everyone is welcome at the door, the family is coming.
Your body is like spicy chicken, and he likes it. He can't resist it.
You are the one who brings joy to our lives, like a battery for our life.
Oh, the music is playing, and I am your happiness.
Don't stay single in the star house.
I don't need a license now, I will give you what you want.
Hey, start with a kiss, and it will last until morning. Sleep well.
Oh no, what will happen if I blow you away? Let's see what happens in room number.
Now that you are here, my heart blooms like a rose.
Don't stay single in the star house.
It's all about the way you tie your hair, the way you cut your face, and how you look. If you have sweetness in your heart, look at me.
Don't stay single in the star house.
